text.value: ASK: Has the child recently had any convulsions?
The child has a danger sign. Advise the mother to go to any nearby health facility within the next 24 hours so a doctor can look at the child and help.
ASK: Is the child able to drink or breastfeed?
ASK: Is the child lethargic or unconscious?
ASK: Does the child vomit everything?
SAY: No danger signs were identified in your child, but if the child develops any of the signs we discussed, you should go the health facility immediately.

SEMA: Habari mama? Kama tulivyozungumza wakati wa matembeleo yetu yaliyopita kuwa ntakuja kukutembelea kwa ajili ya kujua maendeleo na afya ya mtoto/watoto, na pia kujadiliana na wewe pamoja na familia juu ya malezi na makuzi bora ya mtoto/watoto wako. Nafahamu kuwa unajua jinsi ya kumtunza mtoto wako na kumkuza vizuri, lakini hii ni kama nyongeza tu ya elimu kutokana na ongezeko la maradhi na matatizo mbali mbali yanayoweza kudhoofisha afya na makuzi bora ya mtoto.

Greet the family and invite others to join the conversation as appropriate.
SAY: I'd like to enroll into infant and child services. I'll do a first check-up on their health today, and them return at important times as they grow up to make sure they are healthy and well. Is that OK?
Is the birthweight written on the child card?
Enter a number between 0.5 and 7 KG
Enter brithweight of the child, in KG
Approximately how large was the baby at birth?
On the way to the health facility
_Look child card and/or KMC booklet for next scheduled follow-up visit. Advise mother to return to the facility for scheduled follow up visits_
ASK: Have you received small baby services at the hospital?
This is a normal size baby and needs normal care. You will learn about care for the normal baby in later sessions.
This child is a small baby and extra care and attention is needed from both CHV and family. We will talk about some of the special care your baby needs.
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Your baby has a danger sign. This is an URGENT and super serious emergency. You should take the baby IMMEDIATELY to the nearest facility. If it is closed, you need to go to the closest hospital.
Cord red, bleeding, or draining pus

SAY: I'm now going to screen your baby for neonatal danger signs.
Observe and discuss each danger sign with the mother and child. Does the baby have any of the following danger signs right now?
Difficulty or fast breathing (Two counts of 60 breaths or more in one minute)
Excessive crying or restlessness for more than one hour, non-stop
Movement only when stimulated, or no movement even on stimulation
Not able to feed since birth, or stopped feeding well
Yellow or pale palms and soles (hands and feet), and lips. Soles should be red/pink.
A danger sign has been identified. Advise the mother to go to any nearby health facility within the next 24 hours so a doctor can look at the baby and help.
Not passing stool for a day
Not passing urine for a day
No danger signs were identified in your baby, but if the baby develops any of the signs we discussed, you should go the health facility immediately.

SEMA: Habari mama? Kama tulivyozungumza wakati wa matembeleo yetu yaliyopita kuwa ntakuja kukutembelea kwa ajili ya kujua maendeleo na afya ya mtoto/watoto, na pia kujadiliana na wewe pamoja na familia juu ya malezi na makuzi bora ya mtoto/watoto wako. Nafahamu kuwa unajua jinsi ya kumtunza mtoto wako na kumkuza vizuri, lakini hii ni kama nyongeza tu ya elimu kutokana na ongezeko la maradhi na matatizo mbali mbali yanayoweza kudhoofisha afya na makuzi bora ya mtoto.

bind.calculate: if(selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_not_able_feed ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_had_convulsions ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_difficulty_fast_breathing ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_fever ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_cold ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_yellow_pale_palms ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_no_movement ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_cord_bleeding ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_diarrhea ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_eyes_pus ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_skin_boils ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_excessive_vomiting ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs/neonatal_excessive_crying ,'yes'),1,0)

if(selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs_secondary/neonatal_not_crying ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs_secondary/neonatal_blue_color ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs_secondary/neonatal_eye_discharge ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs_secondary/neonatal_skin_rash ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs_secondary/neonatal_congenital ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs_secondary/neonatal_vomiting ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs_secondary/neonatal_bulging_fontanel ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs_secondary/neonatal_abdominal_distension ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs_secondary/neonatal_no_urine ,'yes') or selected( /infant-child/neonatal_danger_signs_secondary/neonatal_no_stool ,'yes'),1,0)

if(selected( /infant-child/child_danger_signs/child_drink ,"no") or selected( /infant-child/child_danger_signs/child_vomit ,"yes") or selected( /infant-child/child_danger_signs/child_convulsions ,"yes") or selected( /infant-child/child_danger_signs/child_lethargic ,"yes"),1,0)
